steps: Purify Gibson reaction using PCR clean-up column according to manufacturer's protocol eluting in 20 microliters of
Add 40 microliters of DNA binding buffer to 20 microliters of Gibson assembly. 40 µL, DNA binding buffer 20 µL, Gibson assembly
Add 200 microliters DNA wash buffer. Make sure ethanol has been added to wash buffer before use. 200 µL, Wash buffer
Centrifuge at 12,000 x g for 1 minute. 00:01:00
Repeat wash and centrifugation (steps 2.4 and 2.5)

Transfer column to a new eppendorf or collection tube then centrifuge at 12,000 x g for 2 minutes to dry column 00:02:00 Sometime residual liquid can collect on a lip inside the column. It may be helpful to rotate the column 180º after a 1 minute spin, then repeat another 1 minute spin to get rid of this liquid.
Add 10 microliter of nuclease free water pre-heated to 50ºC to column and incubate for ≥ 2 minutes 10 µL, nuclease free water 50 °C, Pre-heat water 00:02:00, Incubate
Elecroporation of competent cells

Thaw Lucigen Endura electrocompetent cells on ice. Each DUO vials contains 50uL of cells, enough for 2 electroporations. Use one reaction's worth of cells to electroporate the negative control Gibson assembly.
Centrifuge at 12,000 x g for 1 minute to elute 00:01:00
Optionally nanodrop the recovered DNA. Expected concentration is 10-15ng/uL.
Re-load eluant and re-spin.
If using Biorad Gene Pulser, pre-chill cuvettes to 4ºC. 4 °C, Pre-chill electroporation cuvettes
Pre-warm Lucigen recovery media to 37ºC 37 °C, Pre-warm recovery media
Perform Gibson assembly usiing 100ng linearized vector and 5:1 molar excess of ssDNA template per 20 microliter reaction.

Combine 100ng linearized vector with ~21.7 fmol ssDNA template (1.08 microliters of 100nM oligo) to a final volume of 10 microliters in nuclease free water. In parallel, perform a negative control reaction with plasmid and nuclease free water without the ssDNA insert. Keep on ice. 100 ng, Linearized vector 1.08 µL, ssDNA oligo (160nt) 10 µL, Final volume in NF water
Thaw Gibson assembly master mix on ice then add 10 microliters to plasmid plus insert. Pipette mix then spin down if needed. 10 µL, Gibson Assembly master mix
Pre-heat thermal cycler to 50ºC with lid set to 65ºC. 50 °C, Pre-heat thermal cycler
Incubate on thermal cycler at 50ºC for 1 hour. 50 °C 01:00:00, incubation
Pipet vial of electrocompetent cells into 2 25 microliter aliquots.
Add 2 microliters of cleaned Gibson assembly to 25 microliters of electrocompetent cells. 2 µL, Gibson assembly per 25 µL, electrocompetent cells
Transfer electrocompetent cells to pre-chilled cuvette. Keep on ice.

Using the GenePulserXCell, electroporate with the following manual pulse setting: PL - 25msec, C - 10uF, PC- 600Ohms, V-1800 Pulse length - 25msec, Capacitance - 10 microFaraday, Resistance - 600 ohms, Voltage - 1800 Volts. Expected time constant around 5-6 msec.
Immediately add 975 microliters of pre-warmed recovery media to cuvette then transfer to clean eppendorf or vial.
Incubate on shaker at 250 rpm at 37ºC for 1 hour. 37 °C 01:00:00, On shaker at 250rpm

Plate dilutions of electroporated cells for plating and calculating electroporation efficiency. Prepare first dilution by adding 10 µL, electroporated cells to 990 µL, LB Broth Prepare second dilution by adding 100 µL, First dilution to 900 µL, LB broth Plate 100 µL, first dilution on pre-warmed LB/ampicillin agar plate for a 1:1000 dilution plate. Plate 100 µL, second dilution on pre-warmed LB/Ampicllin agar plate for a 1:10,000 dilution plate. After incubating the plates overnight, expect to see >1,000 colonies on the 1:1000 dilution plate and >200 colonies on the 1:10,000 plate.
Add the remainder of the electroporated cells to 150mL LB broth containing 100ug/mL ampicillin. Incubate 12-14 hours on shaker at 32ºC. 150 mL, LB broth 32 °C 12:00:00 - 14:00:00, shaker

Pellet the overnight culture by centrifugation in 50mL falcon tubes then store pellets at -20ºC or proceed immediately with maxiprep. 00:15:00 4 °C Pellet e. coli cultures. -20 °C, Store e. coli pellets If centrifuge capable of 6,000 x g is unavailable, can pellet at ≥3,000 x g.
Maxiprep barcode plasmid library.
PCR screen colonies to confirm barcode insertion.
creator: Benjamin Emert
